response.overview: 2023  In the spring of 2023, SheYang Sibo purchased 20 tons of soil from the Jinye Shuonuo Mountain Range in Liangshan Yi Autonomous Prefecture, transported from Wenjiang Flower Market in the suburbs of Chengdu, Sichuan Province, to the Ji Huo Art Space in downtown Chengdu. Seeds from the United States were planted in the soil and a poem was cultivated from the grass over one month. Two sheep, borrowed from a Liangshan herdsman, ate the poetry during a seven-day live exhibition, leaving behind their feces. Finally, the two sheep were returned, and the soil was taken back to the cliff top of Jinye Shuonuo Mountain, 646 kilometers away, and scattered over the edge.
response.title: Let poetry return to the gut
